---
title: "First Break AI"
description: "First Break AI has evolved to FBA Lab — the new hands-on front door to real AI systems. Real model code, synced architecture diagrams, terminal logs. No GPU, no setup, no account required."
title-block-style: none
page-layout: custom
css: styles/fba-lab.css
include-after-body:
  - includes/fba-mcp-widget.html
  - includes/mermaid-zoom.html
---

```{=html}
<!-- Hide the Discord login button on this page -->
<style>.fba-auth-nav { display: none !important; }</style>

<div class="fbalab-page">

  <!-- ── Top notice strip ── -->
  <div class="fbalab-notice">
    <span class="fbalab-notice-label">Update</span>
    First Break AI — Cohort 01 is now archived. The journey continues at FBA Lab.
  </div>

  <!-- ── Hero ── -->
  <section class="fbalab-hero">
    <div class="fbalab-hero-inner">
      <p class="fbalab-eyebrow">First Break AI → FBA Lab</p>
      <h1 class="fbalab-headline">The cohort has evolved.</h1>
      <p class="fbalab-sub">
        Cohort 01 started as a live + async cohort. The signal was clear: serious learners
        need a better way to touch real AI systems directly — not more passive sessions.
        So the focus is moving to <strong>FBA Lab</strong>.
      </p>
      <a href="https://bubblnet.com/" class="fbalab-cta" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        Start with FBA Lab &nbsp;→
      </a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ── What is FBA Lab ── -->
  <section class="fbalab-what">
    <div class="fbalab-what-inner">
      <h2 class="fbalab-section-title">What is FBA Lab?</h2>
      <p class="fbalab-section-sub">
        FBA Lab is the new hands-on front door to real AI systems. It brings together
        everything that was missing from a passive cohort session.
      </p>
      <div class="fbalab-cards">
        <div class="fbalab-card">
          <span class="fbalab-card-icon">⬡</span>
          <h3>Real model code</h3>
          <p>Read and run the actual inference and training code — not pseudocode, not slides. The model is the lesson.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="fbalab-card">
          <span class="fbalab-card-icon">⬡</span>
          <h3>Synced architecture diagrams</h3>
          <p>Diagrams that move with the code. See the attention heads, the KV cache, the weight tensors — in sync with what the terminal is doing.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="fbalab-card">
          <span class="fbalab-card-icon">⬡</span>
          <h3>Terminal logs, live</h3>
          <p>Watch a model load, tokenize, decode, and generate — line by line. Not a recording. The actual output.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="fbalab-card">
          <span class="fbalab-card-icon">⬡</span>
          <h3>No GPU, no setup, no account</h3>
          <p>Start immediately. Nothing to install. Nothing to configure. No credits to burn. The barrier to entry is zero.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ── What stays ── -->
  <section class="fbalab-stays">
    <div class="fbalab-stays-inner">
      <h2 class="fbalab-section-title">What stays online</h2>
      <p class="fbalab-section-sub">
        Cohort 01 is archived, not deleted. Everything built during the cohort remains accessible.
      </p>
      <ul class="fbalab-stays-list">
        <li><a href="roadmap.html">Roadmap</a> — six-step learning path from first commit to capstone</li>
        <li><a href="lessons/">Lessons</a> — HuggingFace, Qwen3, inference deep dives, training fundamentals</li>
        <li><a href="office-hours/">Office Hours archive</a> — every recorded session with interactive transcripts</li>
        <li><a href="blog/">Blog</a> — guides on GGUF, training curves, model formats</li>
        <li><a href="https://discord.gg/hRPese4H3F" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Discord</a> — community stays active; focused sessions run when there is real work to review</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ── CTA footer ── -->
  <section class="fbalab-footer-cta">
    <div class="fbalab-footer-cta-inner">
      <h2>Ready to build?</h2>
      <p>FBA Lab is live.</p>
      <a href="https://bubblnet.com/" class="fbalab-cta" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        Open FBA Lab &nbsp;→
      </a>
    </div>
  </section>

</div>
```
